form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 388m at Gosford clocking 22.36. The form from last run stacks up well. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 388m at Gosford clocking 22.36. The form from last run stacks up well. Hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At first turn contacted heels and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (18.68) at Dubbo over 318m. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (18.68) at Dubbo over 318m. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

form.formComment: Won again in another strong performance after leading making it three straight at Richmond over 320m (18.31). Looks well placed and should feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won again in another strong performance after leading making it three straight at Richmond over 320m (18.31). Looks well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh on March 25 over 330m at this track behind Armoured Glass, beaten 10 lengths (19.63) in a Grade 5. Not among the main chances this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished seventh on March 25 over 330m at this track behind Armoured Glass, beaten 10 lengths (19.63) in a Grade 5. Not among the main chances this time.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Shepparton (26.45) in a Grade 5, finishing a 14 length eighth. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Tough line-up and may struggle.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at Shepparton (26.45) in a Grade 5, finishing a 14 length eighth. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Tough line-up and may struggle.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked over heels shortly after the start and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (19.04) over 330m at this track. Will need plenty of luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third at big odds last time (19.04) over 330m at this track. Will need plenty of luck.

form.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (18.86) over 318m at Dubbo. Jumps from the outside. Has to do a bit more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third at big odds last time (18.86) over 318m at Dubbo. Jumps from the outside. Has to do a bit more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Turned head outwardly shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 330m in 18.87. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when eighth over 330m at this track at Grade 5 level. Capable of taking this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back at this track over 330m in 18.87. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when eighth over 330m at this track at Grade 5 level. Capable of taking this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hampered on the turn into the home straight and lost momentum.
Began slowly; Was tightened for racing room shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Most recent effort finished last over 525m at Wagga beaten 7 lengths (31.09) behind Paw Colten in a Grade 5 on March 13. On best form is more than capable. Keep safe.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Most recent effort finished last over 525m at Wagga beaten 7 lengths (31.09) behind Paw Colten in a Grade 5 on March 13. On best form is more than capable. Keep safe.

form.formComment: Surprised on debut at this track to win by 2 lengths in 19.00, beating Nangar County. Last start finished last over 330m at this track beaten 16 lengths (19.91) behind Paw Hart in a Grade 5 on April 8. Solid claims this line-up.
